prompt:
REDESIGN this Muha Meds giveaway poster from scratch using the SAME modern editorial design language as REFERENCE 2 (the approved Muha Members Giveaway redesign). Match REFERENCE 2's: deep midnight-black background with red/gold/cream palette (NO green neon), muted Miami-at-night cityscape with cream/amber distant windows and red horizon haze, wet asphalt foreground catching cinematic red/amber reflections, hero red Challenger with crisp cinematic side/rim lighting, large polished gold Muha 'M' logo as a hero element with subtle red glow, modern display typography (clean white/cream ink with subtle red/amber outer glow), gold polished star icons, cinematic vignette + subtle film grain, premium magazine-cover finish.

REFERENCE 1 is the original poster — use it ONLY for the exact copy text, the number of filled vs empty stars, and any unique elements.

COPY TEXT TO PRESERVE EXACTLY (every word, spelling, punctuation, line break): '1 DAY LEFT' as the main hero headline, 'LAST CHANCE TO ENTER' as the smaller subhead below, with FIVE stars at the top: ONE star filled in polished gold and FOUR stars unfilled (outline-only) — match REFERENCE 1's filled/unfilled pattern. Muha 'M' logo present as the hero brand mark. Do NOT add any other text or taglines.

The Challenger SRT is solid red (TorRed/Octane Red, no stripes/decals), photorealistic, premium. Aspect ratio 3:4, 2160×2880, no watermarks.
